title: croton buchii
intro: Croton buchii, also known as the "Codonopsis" or "Denshin-chi," is a type of plant native to China, and it belongs to the Campanulaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Croton buchii is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress, improving cognitive function, and boosting the immune system. It is commonly prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
